properties.displayName: Deployment safeguards should help guide developers towards AKS recommended best practices
properties.description: A collection of Kubernetes best practices that are recommended by Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). For the best experience, use deployment safeguards to assign this policy initiative: https://aka.ms/aks/deployment-safeguards. Azure Policy Add-On for AKS is a pre-requisite for applying these best practices to your clusters. For instructions on enabling the Azure Policy Add-On, go to aka.ms/akspolicydoc
